blocks: BR-OUTPUT(GOLD I) full railway wiring (currently SR-04 + lib.rs only)

road_a_full_git_dep.name: Full git dep on trios-railway-audit + reqwest GraphQL client
road_a_full_git_dep.scope: Pull trios-railway-audit = { git = 'https://github.com/gHashTag/trios-railway', rev = <sha> } + reqwest with rustls-tls, implement live GraphQL deploys, real Railway API mutations
road_a_full_git_dep.cost: HIGH — adds reqwest/rustls/git-fetch to build matrix; CI offline-build will break; SR-05 Silver-tier dep allowance violated
road_a_full_git_dep.risk: BREAKER — git fetch on cargo build is brittle (pinned-sha needs maintaining), reqwest pulls 50+ transitive crates into the Silver tier, no Railway test project in CI to smoke against
road_a_full_git_dep.verdict: REJECTED — same R-RING-DEP-002 reasoning that kept trios_kg out of SR-MEM-01 silver

road_b_trait_contract.name: RailwayApi trait + observe-only deploy state machine (matches every other Silver ring's precedent)
road_b_trait_contract.scope: Define RailwayApi trait (deploy/audit/fleet_snapshot verbs), DeployerMode enum (Observe vs Apply), DeployReceipt + AuditReport + FleetSnapshot types, R7 audit triplet formatter, in-memory mock backends for tests, concrete reqwest+sqlx adapter ships in sibling BR-IO ring
road_b_trait_contract.cost: LOW — same shape as SR-MEM-01 KgBackend, SR-03 BpbSink, SR-04 GardenerSink, SR-MEM-05 LessonsSource
road_b_trait_contract.risk: LOW — proven 5x, observe-only default + DEPLOYER_MODE env gate is exactly what the issue AC specifies, tests cover every clause
road_b_trait_contract.verdict: CHOSEN — Silver-tier compliant, full RailwayDeployer state machine + R7 audit triplet implemented for real, concrete network adapter deferred to BR-IO with R5 disclosure

road_c_types_only.name: Pure type definitions, no state machine
road_c_types_only.scope: Just struct DeployReceipt / AuditReport / FleetSnapshot with serde, defer all logic to BR-IO
road_c_types_only.cost: MED — leaves the ring's contract empty; downstream BR-IO would have to redefine the deploy state machine
road_c_types_only.risk: MED — issue AC explicitly requires RailwayDeployer::deploy/audit/fleet_snapshot as a public API surface; types-only doesn't satisfy that
road_c_types_only.verdict: REJECTED — does not deliver the public API surface the issue AC names

honest_disclosure_r5: This ring ships RailwayApi trait + RailwayDeployer state machine + R7 audit triplet formatter.
DEPLOYER_MODE=observe is the default; DEPLOYER_MODE=apply requires the env var explicitly per issue AC.
The concrete reqwest GraphQL client and sqlx audit-log writer ship in a sibling BR-IO ring (same precedent as trios_kg::KgClient for SR-MEM-01).
trios-railway-audit is NOT pulled as git dep here — its types/contract are mirrored in this ring (small surface) so cargo build stays offline-friendly.
Smoke against a Railway dev project AC requires RAILWAY_TOKEN_TEST CI secret + the BR-IO adapter PR; deferred honestly.
L1 (no .sh) audited inside this ring tree at scaffold time.
